name: fetch_arbitrum_contract_source
description: Fetches the verified Solidity source code and ABI of a smart contract on Arbitrum Sepolia. Use this BEFORE auditing a contract for security risks.

contractAddress.description: The Ethereum address of the smart contract to fetch source code for

name: simulate_arbitrum_transaction
description: Simulates an Arbitrum transaction using Tenderly's advanced execution tracing API to detect reverts, MEV risks, or honeypots with precise failure analysis. NEVER advise a user to execute a trade without simulating it first.

txPayload.description: Transaction payload containing all necessary fields for simulation

value.description: The ETH value to send (in wei)
